description: Guests book listings for date ranges and can view or cancel their bookings. Double-booking is prevented via atomic conflict detection. Booking status transitions: CONFIRMED → CANCELLED.
functional_requirements: As a guest, I can book a listing for a specific date range; conflicting dates return 409
As a guest, I can view all my bookings
As a guest, I can cancel a booking I made; another user attempting to cancel my booking receives 403
non_functional_requirements: All booking endpoints require JWT authentication
Booking creation must prevent double-booking via atomic check-and-insert
